name: Autumn Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the plums, apples, tomatoes, onions, and garlic together in a large bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to a preserving pan (Note: these books call for an aluminum pan – I avoid using aluminum with acidic foods).
3. Add the remaining ingredients except the sugar; stir until combined.
4. Simmer gently for about 30 minutes until the mixture is tender.
5. Stir in the sugar and continue simmering until dissolved, stirring frequently.
6. Continue cooking until thick (the time depends on the water content of the fruits).
7. Allow to cool, then pack the chutney into clean jars. Seal tightly.
PS: I always refrigerate after opening the jar.
